label: more templates

top.contains: solid blue border with a very thin black top edge

bottom.contains: solid blue border with a very thin black bottom edge

left.contains: solid blue border with a very thin black left edge

right.contains: solid blue sidebar containing the white 'prime' text and smile arrow logo, with a very thin black right edge

frameAnalysis.corners: The entire right-side area, occupying roughly the right quarter of the frame, is a vertical branding panel featuring the white Amazon Prime logo (prime wordmark and smile arrow).
frameAnalysis.instructions: Place the main hero subject of your artwork within the central-left area, making it the dominant feature. Place any titles or key promotional text in the top 20% or central-left area of the cutout. Avoid extending important content too close to the very thin blue-black borders on the top, bottom, and left, as well as the thick solid blue branded sidebar on the right.

frameInstructions: Place the main hero subject of your artwork within the central-left area, making it the dominant feature. Place any titles or key promotional text in the top 20% or central-left area of the cutout. Avoid extending important content too close to the very thin blue-black borders on the top, bottom, and left, as well as the thick solid blue branded sidebar on the right.
